No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3), skills for work (4.4), and fosters cultural understanding and international perspective (4.7).
evidence: 培養學生具備日語聽、說、讀、寫、譯等五項在生活、工作所需之語言能力，以及專業競爭力
培養學生具備人文素養，知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop language skills for 'work' and 'professional competitiveness,' aligning with Target 8.5 for employment skills.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The core competence '培養學生具備創新' (cultivate innovation) directly supports the innovation aspect of Target 9.5.
evidence: 培養學生具備創新、自主學習及反思能力

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Course content on Japanese culture (manga, dramas) indirectly promotes understanding and appreciation of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 知曉日本社會與歷史文化

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use '正版書籍' (official books) implies responsible consumption of intellectual property, a tangential link to SDG 12 principles.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The emphasis on 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權) has a minimal, indirect link to upholding legal frameworks and rights (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course aims to develop an 'international perspective' and 'international mobility,' which are foundational for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6).
evidence: 培養學生具備國際觀、國際移動力
